bad-data-for-direction: Direction should be from or to!
same-account-selected: Same account selcted, you can only move money between different accounts!
no-budget-selected: You have to select a budget category!
no-budgetfood: No food value submitted... you gotta eat
no-base-currency: You have to select a base currency
no-wants-needs: You have to select if you want wants and needs
no-oldpw: You have to give you old password
no-newpw2: The new password's repeat is missing
wrong-pw-repeat: The new password and its repeat are not the same!
no-newaccount-name: You have to name the new account!
no-newaccount-type: You have to select and account type!
no-newaccount-currency: You have to select a currency!
backup-error: Backing up database failed! You might have no right to write in that folder.
